nav.brandAriaLabel: Saideep Engineering Services — go to top

hero.title: Built Tough.
hero.description: For over 18 years, India's commercial vehicle manufacturers have relied on Saideep Engineering for tipper body components, hydraulic parts, and sub-assemblies that hold up under real-world punishment — delivered on time, every time.

about.heading: About Us
about.subheading: Over 18 years of engineering excellence in Navi Mumbai
body: Founded in 2007 by Mr. Sudhir Kumar, Saideep Engineering Services is a Navi Mumbai-based firm specializing in the manufacture and export of high-quality components, sub-assemblies, and assemblies for tipper bodies used across commercial vehicle manufacturers in India.

With nearly two decades of hands-on experience, we have built a reputation for precision, reliability, and timely delivery. Our products meet the rigorous demands of India's commercial transportation industry.

highlights.title: Manufacturer
highlights.desc: In-house manufacturing of precision tipper body components and assemblies.

highlights.title: Exporter
highlights.desc: Exporting quality engineered parts to markets beyond India.

highlights.title: Supplier
highlights.desc: Reliable supply chain partner for commercial vehicle OEMs.

products.heading: Our Products
products.subheading: Engineered components trusted by commercial vehicle manufacturers across India

items.name: Tail Door Locking System (Horizontal)
items.desc: Horizontal type locking mechanism for tipper rear doors — durable and easy to operate.

items.name: Tail Door Locking System (Chain Type)
items.desc: Chain type tail door locking system for commercial tipper bodies.

items.name: Tail Door Locking System (Vertical Hook)
items.desc: Vertical hook tail door locking mechanism assembly for secure rear door closure.

items.name: Hyfix Body Lock Assembly
items.desc: Hyfix body lock assemblies with lock bracket engineered for heavy-duty tipper use.

items.name: Rear Hinge Bracket Assembly
items.desc: Precision-fabricated hinge brackets ensuring secure articulation of tipper bodies.

items.name: Profile Cut Components
items.desc: Custom profile-cut steel components manufactured to exact specifications.

items.name: Tipper Cylinder Mounting Bracket
items.desc: Cradle assembly and mounting brackets for tipper hydraulic cylinders.

items.name: Tyre / Spare Wheel Lifting Winch
items.desc: Robust winches for carrying and deploying spare tyres on commercial trucks.

items.name: Standard Tipper Body Components
items.desc: Complete range of tipper body parts and sub-assemblies for major OEMs across India.
